rule_metadata.name: Pony_gate_php_POST
rule_metadata.description: Possible Pony Sample POST to gate php
rule_metadata.author: Brian Carter

rules.rule_text:
rule Pony_gate_php_POST
{
	meta:
		description = "Possible Pony Sample POST to gate php"
		author = "Brian Carter"
		last_modified = "June 14, 2016"

	condition:
		cuckoo.network.http_post( /gate\.php/ ) and file_type contains "pe" and positives > 5 and new_file
}
